KXCFLGAME-26JUL10TORWPG-TOR.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
KXCFLGAME-26JUL10TORWPG-TOR.rules_primary: If the Toronto Argonauts win the Toronto Argonauts vs Winnipeg Blue Bombers professional CFL football game originally scheduled for Jul 10, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
KXCFLGAME-26JUL10TORWPG-TOR.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Toronto Argonauts vs Winnipeg Blue Bombers professional CFL football game originally scheduled for Jul 10, 2026. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two days). If the game is cancelled or rescheduled to over two days away, the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If the game is declared a tie, the market will resolve to 50/50 for both teams.
KXCFLGAME-26JUL10TORWPG-TOR.title: Will Toronto Argonauts win the Toronto Argonauts vs Winnipeg Blue Bombers football game?
